message:
fix(scorecard-adapter): correct critique status and parallelize session loading

- Map "accepted" critique status to "addressed" instead of "dismissed"
  (accepted means changes were made, so it should count as addressed)
- Load all sessions in parallel in buildProgramSessionData for efficiency
  instead of sequentially loading each session

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
